tileNote: Core/Darkroot encounter cards do not name a tile; the card is placed face down on any exploration tile at setup (core rulebook p.9). Spawn/terrain rows map to the tile's printed node types.

name: Cursed Cavern
tileNote: Level 4 cards are placed on the double-sided Mega Boss game board, encounter side up (four spawn node types and four terrain node types; all four wall nodes beside the doorway are entry nodes).

rewards.source: mega-boss rules insert p.8; not printed on card
rewards.note: Level 4 encounters never reset on bonfire rest and can never be replayed once defeated.

rewards.source: mega-boss rules insert p.8; not printed on card
